text:
Edwin Groothuis (Tue 01/26/10 07:00):
> Maintainer of databases/p5-Rose-DB-Object,

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143245

Looks great, thank you.

Zach
